title: Immaculately Optimized!
description: “The new and cleanest way to max your Minecraft FPS!”  Available for 1.21.5 now
body:
The ultimate Fabric optimization modpack for Minecraft 1.21.5, built for smooth gameplay, high FPS, and maximum compatibility — all without the bloat.

Whether you're running on a low-end laptop or a gaming PC, Immaculately Optimized delivers a clean, fast, and reliable experience with carefully selected performance mods.

 **Key Features:-**

🧠 Built on modern optimization libraries: Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and more

🌙 Includes optifine-features with great changes

🌿 Visual culling improvements, cleaner HUD, and reduced resource usage

💤 Automatically reduces CPU usage when idle (Dynamic FPS)

⚡ Fast startup, faster chunk loading, and smoother gameplay overall.

💡 **Why Choose Immaculately Optimized?**

This pack focuses purely on performance and stability:

✅ No unnecessary cosmetics or content mods

✅ Clean UI and fast menus

✅ Works great with shaders

✅ Ideal for both survival and creative players who value FPS and fluidity

**Built and tested by warrior_786, this pack brings out the true potential of your system with carefully tuned Fabric mods.**
